description: A disclosure-type obligation with a numeric threshold expressed in the clause text itself, to pin that thresholds stay as extracted natural-language values (never parsed into a number here — that's engine/predicates's job at analysis time, not P-EXTRACT's, per CONVENTIONS.md rule 1).

raw_model_output.summary: A site handling more than 1 tonne of hazardous waste annually must file an annual disclosure.

threshold.value: more than 1 tonne of hazardous waste per year
